4439425.title: Georgy Aleksandrov
4439425.extract: Georgy Fedorovich Aleksandrov (Russian: Гео́ргий Фёдорович Алекса́ндров; 22 March 1908 – 7 July 1961) was a Soviet politician and Marxist philosopher.
